01-basic-color-picker.title: Color Trigger
01-basic-color-picker.description: An uncontrolled color picker using Color as the provider and Color.Trigger to open the picker area in a popover.

02-color-picker-opacity.title: Controlled Color Trigger
02-color-picker-opacity.description: A controlled color picker with alpha support, using Color.Trigger to keep the picker area in a popover.

03-color-picker-preview.title: Inline Color Area
03-color-picker-preview.description: Color.Area can be composed directly inside Color when the picker should stay visible.

04-color-slider-primitive.title: Standalone Color Slider
04-color-slider-primitive.description: Color.Slider can be used on its own for hue and opacity control without rendering the full color picker.
